CRANK_SETUP_001 — project lacks `:crank` in `:compilers`.

`mix crank.check` fails fast with this code. Detected by reading the
project's Mix config; the absence of `:crank` in the compilers list
means Boundary's topology check (the `:crank` Mix compiler) is not
running, which silently disables CRANK_DEP_*.

Exercised by:
- test/mix/tasks/crank.check_test.exs — pushes a project config with
  no compilers and asserts the check fails with this code.
